case_title: DAI, HAI YING VS RYAN, BRICEIDA et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,735.00 FILED BY DAI, HAI YING AS TO DEFENDANT RYAN, BRICEIDA DOMINGUEZ, ANDREW ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-05-1997 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT C
